reviews.review_description:
VR has limited dating sim options, so finding My Forked Dating Life seemed promising. While the characters are unique and well-developed, the game is short-lived due to its non-branching choices. Navigating videos is frustrating without an immediate skip or fast-forward option. Repeated attempts to change character paths led to the same unskippable videos. The restaurant area is also annoying, with repeated voice initiations when moving.

In summary, the dialogue and videos are superb and worth the money, but the game leaves much to be desired.
